task: Use debate-router for a raw requirement: decide how a team should reduce CI time without losing coverage. Produce DebateRoute, DebateRecord, and DebateSummary with status, final recommendation, source proposals, sourced amendments, and derivation.

Use debate-router for one proposal: switch Codex CLI network support from workspace-write network_access to danger-full-access by default. Debate adopt, revise, reject, or probe, then summarize the status, classification, final recommendation, source proposal, and derivation.

Use debate-router with Claude Code and Codex CLI as selected external critics for a risky architecture proposal. Include the launch plan, final debate record, status, final recommendation, accepted amendments, and short derivation summary.

Use debate-router for a raw requirement, but assume proposal normalization leaves only one distinct usable proposal after deduplication. Return a degraded DebateRecord and a normal-shape DebateSummary with status and status_reason instead of pretending to run a normal debate.
